title: ZNetwork ACTIVE mode gate
required_reviews: Slide-in plan reviewed — no carrier drop on primary iface
NetworkManager handoff tested in VM with rollback
Field DNS cutover does not break captive portals
DDoS policy limits validated under load test
Windows and macOS backend stubs replaced or waived
NEXUS gatekeeper IPC path signed off
Root sovereign guard whitelist includes znetwork daemon

sign_off.notes: Set approved=true only after all items checked. Requires ZNETWORK_REVIEW_APPROVED=1.
